calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-19-2022 Off Calendar

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-20-586311 WITH CASE CGC-21-597396
Off Calendar May-06-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Atty. JOEL P. GLASER, Esq. of Skane Mills LLP (Tel: 415-431-4150) for defendant T.B. Penick & Sons, Inc.;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT T.B. PENICK & SONS, INC.'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE NO. CGC-20-586311 WITH CASE NO. CGC-21-597396.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant T.B. PENICK & SONS, INC.'s motion to consolidate is granted. Case CGC-20-586311 (Fuller and Lisenby) is consolidated with case CGC-21-597396 (Russell) for all purposes. The cases factually and legally overlap. Moreover, consolidation will preserve judicial resources and prevent inconsistent results. The court recognizes that consolidation will likely delay the trial of the Fuller/Lisenby action, but the denial of consolidation and the denial of leave to file the cross-complaint may lead to three trials rather than one. Weighing everything, it is in the interests of justice to consolidate these actions and designate CGC-20-586311 as the lead case. The trial date remains 7/25/22 and any party may seek a trial continuance in department 206.

Counsel for the prevailing party to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the Court's ruling.

Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/SRB)
